summary: Excellent audience recording of a high‑energy show with top‑shelf playing and standout performances of Cumberland Blues, Cassidy, All Over Now, Estimated Prophet, Terrapin Station and more.
review: The audience tape captures crystal‑clear drums, cymbals and Brent’s clean organ tones while delivering Jerry Garcia on fire and Phil Lesh’s bass front‑and‑center. The band delivers a top‑shelf set featuring Cumberland Blues, Cassidy, All Over Now, Estimated Prophet, Terrapin Station, Eyes, Good Lovin’ and several other highlights, with an audience that sounds like it was having a blast.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers praise the recording’s clarity and the band’s performance; one gives a full 5‑star rating and the other calls it the best‑sounding audience source, indicating an exceptional show and excellent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great sounding drums & cymbals, clean organ, clear overall mix; audience ambience adds to the live feel.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy, tightly flowing set that keeps momentum from start to finish; audience enthusiasm matches the band’s top‑shelf playing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: On fire with his guitar work.
band_member_comments.Phil: Captured better than most recordings of this show; solid bass presence.
band_member_comments.Bob: Vocals on fire, delivering strong lead singing.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brett's (Brent Mydland) organ is nice and clean.
band_member_comments.Drums: Great sounding drums & cymbals by Billy Hart and Mickey Hart.
